creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Created attachment 228327
Patch to 0.10.0

Update to 0.10.0, and mark BROKEN on i386 due to 64-bit time_t assumptions.

Notable changes include accessing logs from remotes via SSH, and transparent
support for compressed and archived logs via libarchive.

Release notes: https://github.com/tstack/lnav/releases/tag/v0.10.0
